validation_rules.Passport: Required for NRI, OCI, PIO and foreign nationals. Must be valid for at least six months from the date of admission/travel.
validation_rules.Class 12 Marksheet: Must show qualifying marks in prerequisite subjects. Science group (PCB) for MBBS/Nursing requires at least 50% aggregate for general category. Engineering requires Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (PCM).
validation_rules.Class 10 Marksheet: Used for verifying date of birth and candidate name consistency across all certificates.
validation_rules.NEET Score Card: Mandatory for MBBS admissions. Must show qualified status with score, rank, and category matching applicant identity.
validation_rules.DASA/CIWG Certificate: For DASA/CIWG quota applicants. Must prove foreign nationality/OCI/PIO or NRI status with at least 2 years of education abroad in classes 11 and 12.
validation_rules.NRI Sponsor Documents: For NRI quota admissions. Must contain sponsor's valid passport, visa/work permit, relationship certificate/declaration, and sponsor's bank statement showing adequate funds.

critical_rules: NEET Score Card is mandatory for medical (MBBS) admissions in India.
Name and date of birth must match exactly across Passport, Class 10, and Class 12 documents.
For DASA/CIWG candidates, proof of education abroad (schooling certificate for classes 11 & 12 outside India) is mandatory.
ai_instructions: Verify name spelling across marksheets, check science group subjects and percentages, validate NEET qualification status, and inspect NRI sponsor relationships.
pass_examples: NEET score 610/720 qualified, 12th marks PCB aggregate 85%, name 'Priyan Bose' matches across all files.
fail_examples: NEET score card missing for MBBS application, or Class 12 aggregate PCB score is under 50%.
